"'''Sore Loser's Revenge'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Eric Cagle]] in [[2004]]. It depicts a battle between [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and several mercenaries led by [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], who had been hired by the disgruntled former Baron Administrator of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], following Lando's unorthodox acquisition of the station.
